case_title: SIMON C K CHOW VS. HANNA CAR WASH SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL, LLC. et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-22-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, SIMON C K AS TO DEFENDANT HANNA CAR WASH SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL, LLC. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO BY MAIL ON NOVEMBER 1, 2002 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, SIMON C K SERVED OCT-31-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HANNA CAR WASH SYSTEMS INTERNATIONAL, LLC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-12-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GREGORY J. BULLIUNG FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-12-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-27-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
